subcodes.first_line: Blessed are they who have arisen to serve the Cause and have uttered that which the All-Bountiful hath revealed in the Book. Happy is he who hath quaffed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله عمل الذین قاموا علی خدمه الامر و نطقوا بما انزله الوهاب فی الکتاب هنیئا لمن شرب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
